info.title: ROOTKey Documentation
info.description: Your API of choice for creating, managing, and validating information easily and securely!

get.description: Check the status of the API on the selected version

example.name: My first wallet
example.description: First wallet created through ROOTKey API

400.description: You have exceeded your usage quota for one or more features.

example.message: You have exceeded your usage quota for one or more features.

example.name: My first wallet

example.name: My first wallet
example.description: First wallet created through ROOTKey API

post.description: Validate the integrity, authenticity and ownership of a file by comparing it with a trusted version

get.description: Returns all soft-deleted vaults and files within the workspace that are eligible for recovery. Items are retained in a recoverable state for a configurable retention window before permanent deletion.
Returns the full audit log of recovery operations performed within the workspace - who requested each recovery, when, and the outcome.

post.description: Restores a soft-deleted vault to active status. All files and records within the vault are restored. The vault's blockchain anchors and integrity proofs are unaffected - blockchain records are immutable and were never deleted.

parameters.name: vaultAddress
parameters.description: The blockchain address of the vault to recover

404.description: Vault not found or not in a recoverable state

example.message: Vault not found or not eligible for recovery

410.description: Recovery window expired - the vault has been permanently deleted

example.message: The recovery window for this vault has expired. The asset has been permanently deleted.

post.description: Restores a soft-deleted file to its vault. All versions of the file are restored. The file's blockchain anchors remain valid - the on-chain integrity proofs were not affected by deletion.

parameters.name: fileId
parameters.description: The ID of the file to recover

404.description: File not found or not in a recoverable state

example.message: File not found or not eligible for recovery

410.description: Recovery window expired - the file has been permanently deleted

example.message: The recovery window for this file has expired. The asset has been permanently deleted.

get.description: Returns the details and current status of a specific recovery operation.

parameters.name: recoveryId
parameters.description: The ID of the recovery operation

description.description: The description of the wallet to help you organize your data
Optional description to help organize wallets

integrity.description: If true the file is intact and has not been tampered with

authenticity.description: If true the file is authentic

ownership.description: If true the file is owned by the owner wallet

ownerWallet.description: Wallet address that owns the file

tokenId.description: File token ID to be validated

file.description: File to be compared against the stored version

id.description: Unique identifier of the recoverable item

name.description: Name of the asset at the time of deletion

expiresAt.description: When the recovery window closes and the asset is permanently deleted

vaultAddress.description: Vault blockchain address - null for vault-type items

vaultName.description: Vault name - null for vault-type items

recoveryId.description: Unique ID of this recovery operation

assetId.description: ID of the recoverable item that was restored

status.description: Current status of the recovery operation

fileId.description: Restored file ID - only present for file recoveries

fileName.description: Restored file name - only present for file recoveries

restoredAt.description: Timestamp when the asset was restored

requestedBy.description: API key label that triggered the recovery
